name: Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Mix cheese, yolks, and sugar or salt in a bowl.
3. Stir in enough matzo meal to make a batter thick enough to work with your hands.
4. Fold in butter (if used) and egg whites.
5. Let stand for 30 minutes.
6. Make small balls and drop them into boiling water. When they rise to the top, remove them from the water using tongs or a slotted spoon.
7. Serve with apple sauce, sugar-cinnamon mix, or sour cream.
